title: Aurora, 33933, Palm Pals Agatha Beetle 5In, Soft Toy, Blue
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Agatha Beetle Soft Toy, 5in, from Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This charming blue beetle plush is filled with beans and fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling and a wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Agatha Beetle is part of the Palm Pals Critters collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Craving, Zoo, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Agatha Beetle measures 13cm. Here comes the muscle of the Palm Pals crew, always ready to lend a helping leg (or six) and a pincer whenever her friends need a boost. Whether it's moving heavy furniture or helping a pal clear out a perfect spot to picnic, Agatha is there with a cheerful nod and an ever-ready stance to support her friends in every endeavour. This friendly Agatha Beetle will surely win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
